revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Works by millennium]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Commons category}} {{Navseasoncats}} {{citation needed|1st-Millennium Works}}
==Categories==
[[en:Category:1st-millennium works]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:1st millennium|Works]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8181896)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{citation needed|1st-Millennium Works}}
{{wikidata link|Q8181896}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1st-millennium works]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1st millennium|Works]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove legacy category-page templates ({{デフォルトソート}}, {{citation needed}}) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22502775894|commit triggered pipeline]]

<!--categories-->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1st-millennium_works here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{Commons category}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{wikidata link|Q8181896}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:1st-millennium works]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1st millennium|Works]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25089550702|time triggered pipeline]]
